passage_title: The meaning and power of smell

sentences.sentence: A survey conducted by Anthony Synott at Montreal's Concordia University asked participants to comment on how important smell was to them in their lives.
sentences.translation: 蒙特利尔康考迪亚大学的安东尼·赛诺特开展了一项调查，请参与者谈谈嗅觉在他们生活中有多重要。

structure.text: conducted by Anthony Synott at Montreal's Concordia University
to comment on how important smell was to them in their lives
how important smell was to them in their lives

difficult_points: conducted by ... 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 A survey，表示调查的执行者。
ask somebody to do something 构成复合结构，to comment 是 participants 要完成的动作。
how important ... 是 comment on 的宾语从句，使用陈述语序而非疑问语序。

sentences.sentence: It became apparent that smell can evoke strong emotional responses.
sentences.translation: 显而易见，气味能够引发强烈的情绪反应。

structure.text: that smell can evoke strong emotional responses

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，真正的主语是后面的 that 从句。
became apparent 表示某事经过调查后变得清楚，而不是一直显而易见。

sentences.sentence: A scent associated with a good experience can bring a rush of joy, while a foul odour or one associated with a bad memory may make us grimace with disgust.
sentences.translation: 与美好经历相联系的气味会带来一阵喜悦，而难闻的气味，或与糟糕记忆相联系的气味，则可能让我们厌恶得皱起脸来。

structure.text: can bring a rush of joy
while a foul odour or one associated with a bad memory may make us grimace with disgust

difficult_points: 两个 associated with ... 都是过去分词短语，分别修饰 scent 和 one。
one 代替前面的 a scent/odour，避免重复。
make us grimace 是 make + 宾语 + 动词原形结构；while 表示两种气味效果的对比。

sentences.sentence: Respondents to the survey noted that many of their olfactory likes and dislikes were based on emotional associations.
sentences.translation: 调查受访者指出，他们在嗅觉上的许多好恶都建立在情感联想之上。

structure.text: that many of their olfactory likes and dislikes were based on emotional associations

difficult_points: that 从句作 noted 的宾语，说明受访者观察到的内容。
olfactory 修饰 likes and dislikes，限定为人们对气味的喜欢与厌恶。
were based on 是被动结构，表示这些好恶以情感联想为基础。

sentences.sentence: Such associations can be powerful enough so that odours that we would generally label unpleasant become agreeable, and those that we would generally consider fragrant become disagreeable for particular individuals.
sentences.translation: 这种联想的力量可能非常强，以至于我们通常认为难闻的气味会变得宜人，而我们通常认为芳香的气味，对某些人来说反而会变得令人不快。

structure.text: Such associations can be powerful enough
so that odours that we would generally label unpleasant become agreeable
that we would generally label unpleasant
and those that we would generally consider fragrant become disagreeable for particular individuals
that we would generally consider fragrant

difficult_points: enough so that 引出结果，说明情感联想强大到足以改变气味评价。
两个 that 定语从句分别修饰 odours 和 those；those 代替前面的 odours。
label/consider + 宾语 + 形容词构成复合宾语，unpleasant 和 fragrant 都是宾语补足语。

sentences.sentence: The perception of smell, therefore, consists not only of the sensation of the odours themselves, but of the experiences and emotions associated with them.
sentences.translation: 因此，人们对气味的感知不仅包含气味本身带来的感觉，还包含与这些气味相关的经历和情绪。

structure.text: consists not only of the sensation of the odours themselves
but of the experiences and emotions

difficult_points: not only ... but ... 连接 consists of 的两个并列宾语，第二个 of 没有省略。
associated with them 修饰 experiences and emotions，them 指 odours。
themselves 用于强调气味本身，与其引发的经历和情绪相对。

expressions.text: consist not only of ... but of ...

sentences.sentence: Odours are also essential cues in social bonding.
sentences.translation: 气味也是建立社会情感纽带的重要线索。
difficult_points: cue 在此指帮助识别关系或触发反应的“线索”。
social bonding 表示人与人之间建立并维系情感纽带的过程。

sentences.sentence: One respondent to the survey believed that there is no true emotional bonding without touching and smelling a loved one.
sentences.translation: 一位调查受访者认为，如果没有触摸和闻到所爱之人，就不会有真正的情感联结。

structure.text: that there is no true emotional bonding
without touching and smelling a loved one

difficult_points: that 引导宾语从句，there be 结构说明真正的情感联结是否存在。
without + 动名词表达否定条件，相当于“如果不……”。
touching 和 smelling 共用宾语 a loved one。

sentences.sentence: In fact, infants recognise the odours of their mothers soon after birth and adults can often identify their children or spouses by scent.
sentences.translation: 事实上，婴儿出生后不久便能辨认母亲的气味，成年人也常常能凭气味认出自己的孩子或配偶。

structure.text: infants recognise the odours of their mothers
and adults can often identify their children or spouses

difficult_points: and 连接两个各有主语和谓语的并列分句。
soon after birth 修饰 infants recognise，表示婴儿很早就具备这种能力。
by scent 表示识别所凭借的方式，而不是识别的对象。

sentences.sentence: In one well-known test, women and men were able to distinguish by smell alone clothing worn by their marriage partners from similar clothing worn by other people.
sentences.translation: 在一项著名测试中，受试男女仅凭气味，就能把自己配偶穿过的衣服与其他人穿过的相似衣服区分开来。

structure.text: clothing worn by their marriage partners
from similar clothing worn by other people

difficult_points: distinguish A from B 是核心结构，A、B 都是 clothing，后面分别带过去分词短语。
worn by ... 相当于 which had been worn by ...，说明衣服由谁穿过。
alone 修饰 by smell，强调受试者只依靠气味。

sentences.sentence: Most of the subjects would probably never have given much thought to odour as a cue for identifying family members before being involved in the test, but as the experiment revealed, even when not consciously considered, smells register.
sentences.translation: 大多数受试者在参加测试之前，可能从未认真想过气味可以作为识别家人的线索；但正如实验所显示的那样，即使人们没有有意识地加以思考，气味仍会被感知并留下印象。

structure.text: would probably never have given much thought to odour
as a cue for identifying family members
before being involved in the test

difficult_points: would never have given 表示对过去情况的推测：受试者此前大概从未认真考虑过此事。
before being involved ... 是被动动名词结构，逻辑主语为 subjects。
when not consciously considered 省略 smells are；register 在此表示气味仍进入人的感知并留下印象。
as the experiment revealed 是插入式方式从句，意为“正如实验所揭示的”。

sentences.sentence: In spite of its importance to our emotional and sensory lives, smell is probably the most undervalued sense in many cultures.
sentences.translation: 尽管嗅觉对我们的情感与感官生活十分重要，但在许多文化中，它可能是最受低估的感官。

structure.text: In spite of its importance to our emotional and sensory lives
is probably the most undervalued sense

difficult_points: In spite of 后接名词短语，表达让步关系，不是从句。
its 指 smell；undervalued 是过去分词形容词，表示嗅觉的重要性未获充分认识。

sentences.sentence: The reason often given for the low regard in which smell is held is that, in comparison with its importance among animals, the human sense of smell is feeble and undeveloped.
sentences.translation: 人们常用来解释嗅觉不受重视的理由是：与嗅觉在动物中的重要性相比，人类的嗅觉微弱且不发达。

structure.text: often given for the low regard
that, in comparison with its importance among animals, the human sense of smell is feeble and undeveloped
in comparison with its importance among animals

difficult_points: given for ... 是过去分词短语修饰 reason；in which 引导定语从句修饰 low regard。
hold something in low regard 意为“不重视某事”，此处使用被动语态。
that 从句作表语，解释具体理由；its 指 smell。

sentences.sentence: While it is true that the olfactory powers of humans are nothing like as fine as those possessed by certain animals, they are still remarkably acute.
sentences.translation: 诚然，人类的嗅觉能力远不如某些动物那么敏锐，但它仍然相当灵敏。

structure.text: that the olfactory powers of humans are nothing like as fine as those possessed by certain animals

difficult_points: While 引导让步从句，意为“虽然；诚然”，并非表示时间。
从句中的 it 是形式主语，that 从句是真正主语。
those 代替 olfactory powers；possessed by ... 是过去分词短语修饰 those。
nothing like as ... as 表示“远不像……那样……”，they 回指 humans' olfactory powers。

sentences.sentence: Our noses are able to recognise thousands of smells, and to perceive odours which are present only in extremely small quantities.
sentences.translation: 我们的鼻子能够识别数千种气味，也能察觉含量极低的气味物质。

structure.text: are able to recognise thousands of smells
which are present only in extremely small quantities

difficult_points: to recognise 和 to perceive 是由 and 连接、共同受 are able 支配的两个不定式。
which 引导定语从句修饰 odours，说明它们即使含量极低也能被察觉。

sentences.sentence: Smell, however, is a highly elusive phenomenon.
sentences.translation: 然而，嗅觉是一种极难捉摸的现象。
difficult_points: however 是插入语，引出嗅觉虽敏锐却难以描述和保存的转折。
elusive 在此表示难以准确捕捉、界定或研究，而不只是“躲避的”。

sentences.sentence: Odours, unlike colours, for instance, cannot be named in many languages because the specific vocabulary simply doesn't exist.
sentences.translation: 例如，与颜色不同，许多语言无法给气味命名，因为相应的专门词汇根本不存在。

structure.text: cannot be named in many languages
because the specific vocabulary simply doesn't exist

difficult_points: unlike colours 是介词短语，插入说明气味与颜色在可命名性上的对比。
cannot be named 是被动语态，表示许多语言缺乏给气味贴上明确名称的手段。
because 从句解释无法命名的原因，specific vocabulary 指专门描述气味的词汇。

sentences.sentence: 'It smells like...,' we have to say when describing an odour, struggling to express our olfactory experience.
sentences.translation: 描述一种气味时，我们往往只能说“它闻起来像……”，艰难地尝试表达自己的嗅觉体验。

structure.text: struggling to express our olfactory experience

difficult_points: 直接引语被前置，we have to say 是报道语。
when describing ... 省略了 we are，逻辑主语是 we。
struggling ... 是现在分词短语，补充说明说话者难以表达嗅觉体验的状态。

sentences.sentence: Nor can odours be recorded: there is no effective way to either capture or store them over time.
sentences.translation: 气味也无法被记录：目前没有有效办法能够将其捕捉或长期保存。

structure.text: to either capture or store them

difficult_points: 否定词 Nor 位于句首引起部分倒装，正常语序为 odours cannot be recorded either。
冒号后的 there be 句解释气味无法记录的原因。
either ... or ... 连接 capture 和 store 两个并列动词，them 指 odours。

sentences.sentence: In the realm of olfaction, we must make do with descriptions and recollections.
sentences.translation: 在嗅觉领域，我们只能依靠描述和回忆来将就。

structure.text: must make do with descriptions and recollections

difficult_points: make do with 表示在缺乏理想手段时“以……勉强应付”。
descriptions and recollections 对应前文无法直接命名、记录和保存气味的问题。

sentences.sentence: This has implications for olfactory research.
sentences.translation: 这会对嗅觉研究产生影响。
difficult_points: This 回指人们只能依靠语言描述和回忆研究气味这一局限。
implications 在此指由这种局限带来的研究后果，而非单纯“暗示”。

sentences.sentence: Most of the research on smell undertaken to date has been of a physical scientific nature.
sentences.translation: 迄今开展的大多数气味研究都属于自然科学性质。

structure.text: Most of the research on smell
has been of a physical scientific nature

difficult_points: undertaken to date 是过去分词短语修饰 research，意为“迄今开展的”。
be of a ... nature 表示“具有……性质”；physical scientific 指自然科学或物理层面的研究取向。

sentences.sentence: Significant advances have been made in the understanding of the biological and chemical nature of olfaction, but many fundamental questions have yet to be answered.
sentences.translation: 人们在理解嗅觉的生物和化学本质方面已经取得重大进展，但许多根本问题仍有待解答。

structure.text: in the understanding of the biological and chemical nature of olfaction
but many fundamental questions have yet to be answered

difficult_points: have been made 使用现在完成时的被动语态，强调已经取得的进展。
have yet to be answered 表示“仍有待回答”，形式肯定但含未完成意义。
but 对比已取得的科学进展与仍未解决的基础问题。

sentences.sentence: Researchers have still to decide whether smell is one sense or two—one responding to odours proper and the other registering odourless chemicals in the air.
sentences.translation: 研究人员仍需确定嗅觉究竟是一种感官还是两种：一种对真正的气味作出反应，另一种则感知空气中无味的化学物质。

structure.text: whether smell is one sense or two
and the other registering odourless chemicals in the air

difficult_points: have to decide 表示仍需作出判断；whether ... or ... 引导 decide 的宾语从句。
破折号后的 one ... and the other ... 对 two senses 作同位解释。
proper 放在名词 odours 后，意为“严格意义上的、真正的”，不是“合适的”。
responding 和 registering 是现在分词，分别修饰 one 和 the other。

sentences.sentence: Other unanswered questions are whether the nose is the only part of the body affected by odours, and how smells can be measured objectively given the nonphysical components.
sentences.translation: 其他尚未解答的问题包括：鼻子是否是身体中唯一受气味影响的部位，以及考虑到气味中的非物质成分，怎样才能客观测量气味。

structure.text: whether the nose is the only part of the body affected by odours
and how smells can be measured objectively

difficult_points: whether 从句和 how 从句由 and 并列，共同作表语说明 unanswered questions 的内容。
affected by odours 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 the only part of the body。
given 在此是介词，意为“考虑到”；how 从句使用陈述语序。

sentences.sentence: Questions like these mean that interest in the psychology of smell is inevitably set to play an increasingly important role for researchers.
sentences.translation: 这类问题意味着，研究人员势必会越来越重视嗅觉心理学。

structure.text: that interest in the psychology of smell is inevitably set to play an increasingly important role for researchers
is inevitably set to play an increasingly important role

difficult_points: that 从句作 mean 的宾语，说明这些未解问题带来的研究趋势。
be set to do 表示某事很可能或势必发生。
形式主语是 interest；play an important role for researchers 表示这一领域对研究人员的重要性上升。

expressions.meaning_zh: 发挥越来越重要的作用

sentences.sentence: However, smell is not simply a biological and psychological phenomenon.
sentences.translation: 然而，嗅觉并不只是一种生物和心理现象。

structure.text: is not simply a biological and psychological phenomenon

difficult_points: However 转向嗅觉的文化、社会和历史维度。
not simply 表示“不仅仅是”，为后文补充其他属性作铺垫。

sentences.sentence: Smell is cultural, hence it is a social and historical phenomenon.
sentences.translation: 嗅觉具有文化属性，因此也是一种社会和历史现象。

structure.text: it is a social and historical phenomenon

difficult_points: cultural 在此表示嗅觉的意义和评价受文化塑造，而非气味本身属于某种文化。
hence 是连接副词，表达因果结果，不引导从句；it 指 smell。

sentences.sentence: Odours are invested with cultural values: smells that are considered to be offensive in some cultures may be perfectly acceptable in others.
sentences.translation: 气味被赋予了文化价值：在某些文化中被认为令人反感的气味，在另一些文化中可能完全可以接受。

structure.text: Odours are invested with cultural values
that are considered to be offensive in some cultures

difficult_points: be invested with 表示气味被社会“赋予”文化价值。
冒号后的分句具体说明文化如何改变对气味的评价。
that 从句修饰 smells；others 代替 other cultures，而不是 other smells。

sentences.sentence: Therefore, our sense of smell is a means of, and model for, interacting with the world.
sentences.translation: 因此，我们的嗅觉既是与世界互动的一种手段，也是这种互动的一种模式。

structure.text: is a means of, and model for, interacting with the world

difficult_points: a means of 和 a model for 由 and 并列，并共同关联 interacting with the world。
两个逗号突出插入式并列结构，不能把 means of 单独理解成未完成成分。
interacting 是动名词，分别作介词 of 和 for 所引关系的核心内容。

sentences.sentence: Different smells can provide us with intimate and emotionally charged experiences and the value that we attach to these experiences is interiorised by the members of society in a deeply personal way.
sentences.translation: 不同气味能够带给我们私密且情感强烈的体验，而我们赋予这些体验的价值，会由社会成员以极为个人化的方式内化。

structure.text: Different smells can provide us with intimate and emotionally charged experiences
that we attach to these experiences
is interiorised by the members of society

difficult_points: and 连接两个完整分句，后半句主语是 the value，而不是 experiences。
that 引导定语从句修饰 value，并在从句中作 attach 的宾语。
attach value to 表示“赋予……价值”；is interiorised 是被动语态，指价值观被社会成员内化。

sentences.sentence: Importantly, our commonly held feelings about smells can help distinguish us from other cultures.
sentences.translation: 重要的是，我们对气味所共有的感受能够帮助我们与其他文化群体区分开来。

structure.text: our commonly held feelings about smells

difficult_points: commonly held 是过去分词短语作定语，表示一个文化群体共同持有的感受。
distinguish us from other cultures 在语义上是把本文化群体与其他文化群体区别开。
help 后可直接接动词原形 distinguish，不必使用 to。

sentences.sentence: The study of the cultural history of smell is, therefore, in a very real sense, an investigation into the essence of human culture.
sentences.translation: 因此，从非常实际的意义上说，对气味文化史的研究就是对人类文化本质的探究。

structure.text: The study of the cultural history of smell
an investigation into the essence of human culture

difficult_points: 主语中心词是 The study，后面两个 of 短语逐层限定研究对象。
therefore 和 in a very real sense 都是插入性状语，去掉后主干仍为 The study ... is an investigation。
investigation into 表示对某一深层问题的探究。

expressions.meaning_zh: 从非常实际的意义上说
